title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, develops, tests, and maintains scalable software systems and applications across web, mobile, cloud, and enterprise platforms.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Builds and manages both frontend and backend systems using modern web technologies. Handles APIs, databases, authentication systems, and interactive user interfaces.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Creates highly interactive, responsive, and visually appealing user interfaces for web applications using modern frontend frameworks and UI systems.

education.minimumQualification: Graduate in any stream with Coding Certification

name: Full Stack Developer
description: Handles both client-side and server-side development. Proficient in managing databases, building APIs, and creating interactive UIs using a unified tech stack.

name: Frontend Developer
description: Specializes in creating the visual and interactive parts of a website. Ensures high performance, responsiveness, and seamless user experiences across devices.
minQualification: Graduate in any stream with Coding Certification

name: Backend Developer
description: Focuses on server-side logic, database management, and API architecture. Ensures the system is secure, scalable, and fast behind the scenes.

name: Web Developer
description: Builds and maintains websites using CMS or custom code. Often a generalist role handling everything from hosting to basic design updates.
minQualification: Diploma or Degree in any field

name: Mobile App Developer
description: Develops applications specifically for smartphones and tablets, focusing on mobile-first user interfaces and hardware integration.

name: Game Developer
description: Combines creative design with coding to build interactive video games. Involves physics engines, 3D modeling, and real-time rendering.

name: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Integrates software with hardware. Works on specialized systems like medical devices, automotive controllers, and IoT hardware.

name: Firmware Engineer
description: Writes low-level code that directly controls hardware. Essential for device drivers, bootloaders, and hardware-specific optimizations.

name: DevOps Engineer
description: Bridges the gap between development and operations by automating software delivery pipelines and managing infrastructure. Focuses on CI/CD, automation, and system reliability.

name: Cloud Engineer
description: Responsible for designing, implementing, and managing cloud-based infrastructure. Optimizes cloud resources for cost, performance, and scalability.

name: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
description: Applies software engineering mindsets to system administration. Focuses on availability, latency, performance, and capacity of production services.
minQualification: B.Tech in CS/IT (with high problem-solving skills)

name: System Administrator
description: Maintains, configures, and ensures the reliable operation of computer systems and servers. Handles user accounts, permissions, and internal hardware updates.
minQualification: Diploma or Graduate in any field

name: Network Engineer
description: Sets up, develops, and maintains computer networks within an organization. Focuses on switches, routers, and secure data transit protocols.
minQualification: B.Tech (ECE/CSE) or BCA with CCNA certification

name: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protects an organization's network and data from cyber attacks. Monitors systems for security breaches and implements defense strategies.
minQualification: B.Tech / BCA with CEH or Security+ Certification

name: Ethical Hacker
description: Legally breaks into systems to identify vulnerabilities before malicious hackers can exploit them. Focuses on offensive security, bug bounties, and infrastructure hardening.
minQualification: B.Tech / BCA with CEH or OSCP Certification

name: Security Engineer
description: Builds and maintains the security infrastructure of an organization. Focuses on developing automated security tools, firewalls, and secure coding practices.

name: Penetration Tester
description: Conducts deep-dive simulated attacks on networks, APIs, and applications. Provides detailed reports on how to patch security gaps to comply with regulatory standards.

name: Information Security Analyst
description: Monitors security logs, investigates incidents, and ensures the organization follows data privacy laws. Acts as the first line of defense in a Security Operations Center (SOC).
minQualification: Graduate in IT/CS or related field

name: Data Scientist
description: Extracts actionable insights from large datasets using statistical modeling, machine learning, and data visualization. Solves complex business problems using predictive analytics.

name: Data Analyst
description: Translates numbers into plain English to help organizations make better business decisions. Uses statistical tools to interpret data sets and identify trends.
minQualification: Graduate in any field with strong analytical skills

name: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Designs and builds self-running software to automate predictive models. Sits at the intersection of software engineering and data science.
minQualification: B.Tech in CS/IT or M.Tech in ML

name: AI Engineer
description: Develops intelligent algorithms capable of learning and making decisions. Focuses heavily on integrating AI models into functional user applications.

name: Data Engineer
description: The 'plumber' of the data world. Builds the infrastructure and pipelines that allow data scientists and analysts to access clean, reliable data.
minQualification: B.Tech / B.E. in CS or IT

name: Business Intelligence (BI) Analyst
description: Bridges the gap between data and business strategy. Creates high-level dashboards and reports that executive leadership uses to monitor company health.
minQualification: Graduate with Data Viz certification or MBA

name: NLP Engineer
description: Specializes in teaching machines to understand, interpret, and generate human language. Critical for chatbots, translation, and sentiment analysis.

name: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Develops algorithms that allow computers to 'see' and interpret visual data from the real world. Focuses on object detection, image segmentation, and real-time video processing.

name: Research Scientist (AI/CS)
description: Pushes the boundaries of what is possible in computer science. Conducts experiments and publishes papers on novel AI architectures, algorithms, and theoretical models.

name: Robotics Engineer
description: Designs, builds, and maintains robots and robotic systems. Works at the intersection of mechanical engineering, electronics, and software for automation.

name: Automation Engineer
description: Focuses on creating automated testing and deployment systems to ensure software quality and industrial efficiency. Eliminates manual, repetitive tasks through code.

name: AR/VR Developer
description: Creates immersive experiences for Augmented and Virtual Reality platforms. Develops everything from interactive gaming to industrial training simulations.

name: Quantum Computing Researcher
description: Explores the application of quantum mechanics to solve problems that are impossible for classical computers. Focuses on quantum algorithms and cryptography.
minQualification: M.Tech / PhD in CS or Physics

name: Mechanical Engineer
description: Designs, analyzes, and manufactures mechanical systems and devices. Focuses on energy systems, manufacturing processes, and structural integrity using CAD/CAM and Digital Twin technologies.

name: Civil Engineer
description: Oversees the design and construction of infrastructure projects like bridges, roads, and buildings. Focuses on structural safety, sustainability, and smart city integration.

name: Electrical Engineer
description: Designs and develops electrical systems including power generation, transmission, and distribution. Focuses on renewable energy integration and smart grid technologies.

name: Electronics Engineer
description: Designs and develops electronic circuits and components. Focuses on semiconductor technologies, signal processing, and communication systems.

name: Aerospace Engineer
description: Designs and tests aircraft, spacecraft, and missiles. Focuses on aerodynamics, propulsion systems, and flight mechanics for defense and space exploration.

name: Mechatronics Engineer
description: Combines mechanical, electrical, and computer engineering to create 'smart' machines. Focuses on industrial automation, robotics, and integrated control systems.
minQualification: B.Tech in Mechatronics / Robotics / Mechanical (with automation certifications)

name: Production-Engineer
description: Plans and executes the entire production lifecycle. Optimizes manufacturing processes to ensure maximum output at minimum cost while maintaining strict safety and quality standards.
minQualification: B.Tech / B.E. in Production or Mechanical Engineering

name: Quality Assurance (QA) Engineer - Industrial
description: Ensures physical products meet manufacturing specifications. Implements quality control systems, conducts audits, and manages supplier quality in a factory environment.

name: Maintenance Engineer
description: Responsible for the continuous operation of plant machinery. Focuses on preventive, predictive, and breakdown maintenance to minimize production downtime.
minQualification: B.Tech / B.E. in Mechanical or Electrical

name: Industrial Engineer
description: Designs systems that integrate workers, machines, and materials. Focuses on supply chain efficiency, facility layout, and human factors to increase productivity.

name: QA Engineer (Software)
description: Develops and executes software testing strategies. Focuses on ensuring that the final software product meets business requirements and is free of defects.

name: Software Tester
description: Executes specific test cases to find bugs in software. Focuses heavily on manual testing, regression testing, and reporting issues to developers.
minQualification: Graduate in any stream (with testing certification)

name: Automation Tester
description: Writes scripts and uses tools to automate the software testing process. Focuses on efficiency, reducing manual effort, and ensuring faster deployment cycles through CI/CD integration.

name: Product Manager
description: Owns the 'Why', 'What', and 'When' of a product. Acts as the CEO of the product, balancing customer needs, business goals, and technical feasibility to define a winning roadmap.
minQualification: B.Tech + MBA or relevant Product experience

name: Technical Product Manager (TPM)
description: A Product Manager with a deep technical background. Focuses on the internal architecture, APIs, and complex engineering challenges of a product, working closely with dev teams.

name: Project Manager
description: Ensures projects are completed on time, within budget, and to the required quality. Focuses on the 'How' and 'Who', managing resources, risks, and stakeholder expectations.

name: Business Analyst (BA)
description: Analyzes business needs and translates them into technical requirements. Acts as a translator between business stakeholders and the development team.

name: IT Consultant
description: Provides expert advice to businesses on how to use information technology to meet their objectives. Often works on large-scale digital transformation and system implementation projects.
minQualification: B.Tech + MBA or 5+ years IT experience

name: UI/UX Designer
description: Designs intuitive and visually stunning digital experiences. Focuses on the entire user journey, from initial research and wireframing to high-fidelity visual design and interactive prototyping.
minQualification: Graduate in any stream (Portfolio is more important than degree)

name: UI Developer
description: Bridges the gap between design and technology. Specializes in turning static designs into interactive, high-performance web interfaces using modern frontend frameworks.

name: Technical Writer
description: Simplifies complex technical information into clear, concise documentation. Creates API guides, user manuals, and developer portals for software and hardware products.
minQualification: Any Graduate with excellent writing skills and technical aptitude

name: Blockchain Developer
description: Designs and implements decentralized networks and protocols. Works on core blockchain architecture, consensus mechanisms, and secure peer-to-peer data structures.
minQualification: B.Tech in CS/IT (Foundational knowledge of blockchain is mandatory)

name: Web3 Developer
description: Builds decentralized applications (dApps) that interact with blockchains. Focuses on the integration layer between smart contracts and modern web technologies.
minQualification: B.Tech / BCA with Frontend & Solidity basics

name: Smart Contract Developer
description: Specializes in writing and auditing self-executing code on the blockchain. Focuses on security, gas optimization, and logic implementation for DeFi and DAO protocols.
minQualification: B.Tech CS (Strong focus on security and logic auditing)

name: IoT Engineer
description: Develops and integrates smart systems that connect physical devices to the internet. Focuses on sensor networks, data collection, and real-time hardware-software communication.

name: Digital Forensics Expert
description: Recovers and analyzes data from digital devices to investigate crimes. Focuses on maintaining a chain of custody and providing evidence for legal proceedings.
minQualification: B.Tech with specialized Cyber Forensics certification

name: Cybercrime Investigator
description: Works with law enforcement or private agencies to track down cyber criminals. Specializes in identifying patterns in phishing, financial fraud, and data breaches.
minQualification: Graduate in IT/CS or Law with IT specialization

name: GIS Developer
description: Builds and maintains Geographic Information Systems. Combines mapping data with software development to create spatial visualization and navigation tools.

name: Bioinformatics Analyst
description: Applies computational techniques to analyze biological data, such as DNA sequences and protein structures. Essential for drug discovery and genetic research.
minQualification: B.Tech / M.Sc in Bioinformatics or Biotech

name: Sports Data Analyst
description: Uses statistical models to evaluate player performance, team strategy, and match outcomes. Provides insights for recruitment, training, and real-time game tactics.
minQualification: Graduate in Statistics / CS / Engineering with interest in Sports

name: Lecturer / Professor
description: Teaches academic subjects at universities or colleges. Conducts original research, publishes scholarly articles, and mentors students in specialized fields of study.
minQualification: Post-Graduation + UGC NET (or PhD for Professor roles)

name: Technical Trainer
description: Delivers specialized technical instruction to corporate employees or students. Focuses on bridging the skill gap in specific technologies like Cloud, AI, or SAP.

name: Coding Instructor
description: Teaches programming languages and software development principles to beginners or bootcamp students. Focuses on practical coding, logic building, and project-based learning.
minQualification: B.Tech / BCA (Strong coding logic is essential)

name: PSU Engineer (E1 Level)
description: Works in Public Sector Undertakings at the entry executive level. Handles engineering operations, maintenance, and project supervision in core industrial sectors.

name: UPSC Engineering Services Officer (IES)
description: A Class-1 officer in the Indian Engineering Services. Manages large-scale government engineering projects and technical administration for the Government of India.

name: DRDO Scientist
description: Conducts high-level defense research and development. Works on advanced weapon systems, aerospace technology, and national security solutions.
minQualification: B.Tech (First Class) + GATE or DRDO entrance exam

name: ISRO Scientist/Engineer
description: Designs and develops technologies for space exploration. Works on satellite systems, launch vehicles, and interplanetary missions, contributing to India's national space program.
minQualification: B.E / B.Tech in Electronics, Mechanical, or Computer Science (First Class)

name: Freelance Developer
description: Operates as an independent contractor providing software development services to multiple clients globally. Manages the entire project lifecycle from acquisition to delivery.

name: Indie Hacker
description: Builds and launches independent software products (SaaS, Apps, Tools) without venture capital. Focuses on 'ramen profitability' and building profitable micro-businesses.
minQualification: Ability to build and market a product end-to-end

name: Startup Founder
description: Establishes and leads a new business venture designed for rapid growth. Responsible for fundraising, team building, product vision, and overall strategy to disrupt a market.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Specializes in building the visual and interactive elements of websites and applications that users interact with directly.

title: Backend Developer
description: Focuses on server-side logic, databases, and APIs that power the functional side of applications and manage data flow.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Handles both frontend and backend development, managing the entire lifecycle of a web application from UI to database.

title: AI Engineer
description: Develops and deploys intelligent algorithms and models, including Machine Learning and Generative AI, to solve complex problems.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protects an organization's computer networks and systems by monitoring for security breaches and implementing defensive measures.

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Designs, analyzes, and manufactures mechanical systems, machinery, and thermal devices ranging from small components to large industrial plants.

title: Civil Engineer
description: Plans, designs, and oversees construction and maintenance of building structures and infrastructure like roads, bridges, and water systems.

title: Electrical Engineer
description: Deals with the study, design, and application of equipment and systems which use electricity, electronics, and electromagnetism.

title: Electronics Engineer
description: Designs and develops electronic equipment, such as broadcast and communications systems, ranging from portable players to GPS systems.

title: Robotics Engineer
description: Combines mechanical, electrical, and software engineering to design, build, and program robots and robotic systems for various applications.

title: Automobile Engineer
description: Focuses on the design, development, production, and testing of cars, trucks, motorcycles, and other vehicles, including EV technology.

title: Doctor
description: Diagnoses, treats, and manages patient illnesses and injuries through medical examinations, surgeries, and prescriptions.

title: Pharmacist
description: Expert in medicines who dispenses prescriptions, advises on drug interactions, and ensures safe medication management.

title: Nurse
description: Provides hands-on patient care, monitors health status, administers medications, and assists doctors in clinical settings.

title: Physiotherapist
description: Helps patients recover physical movement and function lost due to injury, illness, or disability through exercise and manual therapy.

title: Lab Technician
description: Performs laboratory tests on blood, tissue, and fluids to help physicians diagnose and treat diseases.

title: Radiologist
description: A medical doctor specializing in interpreting medical images like X-rays, CT scans, and MRIs to diagnose and treat conditions.

title: Indian Army Officer
description: Leads troops in combat, tactical operations, and peace-time missions while managing personnel and advanced land-based weaponry systems.

title: Indian Navy Officer
description: Commands naval ships, submarines, or aircraft to protect maritime borders and conduct deep-sea strategic operations.

title: Air Force Pilot
description: Operates fighter jets, transport aircraft, or helicopters for combat, surveillance, and rescue missions in the Indian Air Force.

title: Defence Research Scientist
description: Conducts high-level research to design and develop indigenous missile systems, electronic warfare tools, and military hardware for DRDO.

education.minimumQualification: B.E / B.Tech / Post Graduation in Science

title: Coast Guard Officer
description: Protects India's maritime interests, prevents smuggling, ensures safety of fishermen, and preserves the marine environment.

education.minimumQualification: Bachelor's Degree with Maths & Physics at 10+2

title: Military Nursing Officer
description: Provides medical care and nursing services to soldiers and their families in military hospitals during peace and war.

title: Data Scientist
description: Extracts meaningful insights from large datasets using statistics, machine learning, and programming to drive business decision-making.

education.minimumQualification: B.Tech / B.E / M.Sc in Statistics or CS

title: Research Scientist
description: Conducts systematic experiments and research to discover new knowledge, develop new products, or improve existing technologies.

title: Biotechnologist
description: Uses biological organisms and systems to develop technologies and products for healthcare, agriculture, and environment.

title: Microbiologist
description: Studies microscopic organisms like bacteria, viruses, and fungi to understand their impact on humans and the environment.

title: Chemist
description: Studies the properties of matter and chemical reactions to develop new materials, drugs, and products for industrial use.

title: Physicist
description: Investigates the fundamental laws of the universe, from subatomic particles to galaxies, using mathematical models and experiments.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Focuses on the total user experience and the visual interface of digital products to ensure they are intuitive, accessible, and aesthetically pleasing.

education.minimumQualification: Bachelor's in Design / Fine Arts / CS

title: Graphic Designer
description: Creates visual concepts to communicate ideas that inspire, inform, or captivate consumers through layout and production design.

education.minimumQualification: Bachelor's in Graphic Design / Fine Arts

title: Interior Designer
description: Plans and furnishes the interiors of private homes and commercial buildings to make them functional, safe, and aesthetically pleasing.

education.minimumQualification: B.Des / B.Arch / Diploma in Interior Design

title: Fashion Designer
description: Conceptualizes and creates clothing, accessories, and footwear, considering trends, materials, and consumer preferences.

title: Industrial Designer
description: Develops concepts for manufactured products, such as cars, home appliances, and toys, combining art, business, and engineering.

title: Motion Graphics Designer
description: Combines graphic design with animation and video to create moving visual effects for movies, websites, and television.

title: Product Manager
description: Leads the lifecycle of a product from conception to launch, bridging the gap between business goals, user needs, and technical constraints.

title: Project Manager
description: Responsible for planning, executing, and closing projects while managing timelines, budgets, and resource allocation to meet specific goals.

title: Marketing Manager
description: Develops and executes strategies to promote products or brands, managing budgets and campaigns across digital and traditional channels.

title: HR Manager
description: Oversees recruitment, employee relations, performance management, and organizational culture while ensuring legal compliance.

title: Operations Manager
description: Ensures day-to-day business processes are efficient and effective, focusing on supply chain, production, and cost optimization.

title: Finance Manager
description: Oversees the financial health of an organization, including budgeting, financial reporting, risk assessment, and investment strategies.
